Plaintiff Jp Morgan Chase Bank, National Association'S Order To Show Cause Why The Appointment Of The Receiver Should Not Be Confirmed
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THE APPOINTMENT OF THE RECEIVER SHOULD NOT BE CONFIRMED.
APPEARANCES: Selwyn Whitehead, Esq. of Law Offices of Selwyn Whitehead 510/632-7444 specially appearing for deft & opposing party (counsel requested a continuance however gave late notice (after 4pm) to the other side of her intent to appear at the hearing); no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW/PB) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
